verification.cleanRepositoryInstall: passed (rm -rf node_modules && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; zero effect in node_modules or the .pnpm store; cold build passes)
verification.consumerSmoke: passed (packed @czap/core closure: Cell define/subscribe/dispose + S.struct/Codec.decode -> Result, executed from packed .d.ts + .js with zero effect installed)
verification.reactivePublishAllocation: 0.0000 B/op with a live subscriber (CellKernel.fanout; was ~13 B/op via effect Queue.offerUnsafe)

notes.adr: ADR-0005 superseded by ADR-0042 (not erased) — the migration bridge from each Effect responsibility to its native owner.
notes.unrelatedFinding: The packed-consumer proof surfaced a PRE-EXISTING, effect-unrelated packaging leak: packages/core/src/capsules/canonical-cbor-decode.ts eagerly imports 'fast-check' (used by withArbitrary) but fast-check is not declared in @czap/core's package.json (root devDep only). A fresh consumer importing @czap/core must currently also install fast-check. Flagged for a separate fix (declare it optional/peer, or lazy-import); NOT part of the effect shed.
